results.question: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: WITH category_sales AS (SELECT "P"."Category", SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM("S"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit" FROM "Sales" "S" JOIN "Product" "P" ON "S"."ProductKey" = "P"."ProductKey" GROUP BY "P"."Category"), total_revenue AS (SELECT SUM("Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue", SUM("Sales Amount" - "Total Product Cost") AS "total_gross_profit" FROM "Sales") SELECT "Category", "revenue", ("revenue" / (SELECT "total_revenue" FROM total_revenue)) * 100 AS "revenue_share_pct", "units_sold", "gross_profit", ("gross_profit" / "revenue") * 100 AS "gross_margin_pct" FROM category_sales ORDER BY "revenue" DESC;

results.question: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.error: No tool call in response after 3 attempts

results.question: Show revenue and units sold broken down by territory group, country, region, and fiscal year. Return columns: Group, Country, Region, Fiscal Year, revenue, units_sold. Sort by Group, Country, Region, then Fiscal Year all ascending.
results.sql: SELECT "st"."Group", "st"."Country", "st"."Region", "d"."Fiscal Year", SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM("s"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold" FROM "Sales" "s" JOIN "Date" "d" ON "s"."OrderDateKey" = "d"."DateKey" JOIN "Sales_Territory" "st" ON "s"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "st"."SalesTerritoryKey" GROUP BY "st"."Group", "st"."Country", "st"."Region", "d"."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY "st"."Group" ASC, "st"."Country" ASC, "st"."Region" ASC, "d"."Fiscal Year" ASC;

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.sql: SELECT "C"."Customer", "C"."City", "C"."State-Province", "C"."Country-Region", COUNT(DISTINCT "SO"."Sales Order") AS "total_orders", COUNT("S"."SalesOrderLineKey") AS "total_line_items", SUM("S"."Order Quantity") AS "total_units", SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "lifetime_revenue", SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") AS "lifetime_profit" FROM "Customer" "C" JOIN "Sales" "S" ON "C"."CustomerKey" = "S"."CustomerKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey" WHERE "C"."CustomerKey" != -1 GROUP BY "C"."Customer", "C"."City", "C"."State-Province", "C"."Country-Region" ORDER BY "lifetime_revenue" DESC LIMIT 15;

results.question: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT "R"."Business Type", COUNT(DISTINCT "R"."ResellerKey") AS "reseller_count", SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue", SUM("S"."Sales Amount") / COUNT(DISTINCT "R"."ResellerKey") AS "revenue_per_reseller", SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") / SUM("S"."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" "S" JOIN "Sales_Order" "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Reseller" "R" ON "S"."ResellerKey" = "R"."ResellerKey" WHERE "SO"."Channel" = 'Reseller' GROUP BY "R"."Business Type" ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC;
results.error: No tool call in response after 3 attempts

results.question: Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.
results.sql: SELECT "d"."Month" AS "Month", "d"."MonthKey" AS "MonthKey", SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "monthly_revenue", COUNT(DISTINCT "so"."Sales Order") AS "orders", SUM("s"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold" FROM "Sales" "s" JOIN "Date" "d" ON "s"."OrderDateKey" = "d"."DateKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" "so" ON "s"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey" GROUP BY "d"."Month", "d"."MonthKey" ORDER BY "d"."MonthKey" ASC;

results.question: Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.
results.sql: SELECT "Country-Region", COUNT("ResellerKey") AS "reseller_count", COUNT(DISTINCT "Business Type") AS "business_type_count", COUNT(DISTINCT "State-Province") AS "state_count" FROM "Reseller" GROUP BY "Country-Region" ORDER BY "reseller_count" DESC;

List all distinct fiscal years. Return columns: Fiscal Year. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.

results.question: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: WITH "group_year_channel_sales" AS (SELECT "st"."Group", "d"."Fiscal Year", "so"."Channel", SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "channel_revenue" FROM "Sales" "s" JOIN "Sales_Order" "so" ON "s"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Sales_Territory" "st" ON "s"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "st"."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Date" "d" ON "s"."OrderDateKey" = "d"."DateKey" GROUP BY "st"."Group", "d"."Fiscal Year", "so"."Channel"), "group_year_total_sales" AS (SELECT "Group", "Fiscal Year", SUM("channel_revenue") AS "group_year_revenue" FROM "group_year_channel_sales" GROUP BY "Group", "Fiscal Year"), "ranked_channels" AS (SELECT "gycs"."Group", "gycs"."Fiscal Year", "gycs"."Channel", "gycs"."channel_revenue", "gyts"."group_year_revenue", ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "gycs"."Group", "gycs"."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY "gycs"."channel_revenue" DESC) AS "rank" FROM "group_year_channel_sales" "gycs" JOIN "group_year_total_sales" "gyts" ON "gycs"."Group" = "gyts"."Group" AND "gycs"."Fiscal Year" = "gyts"."Fiscal Year") SELECT "Group", "Fiscal Year", "Channel" AS "top_channel", "channel_revenue", "group_year_revenue", ("channel_revenue" / "group_year_revenue") * 100 AS "channel_revenue_share_pct" FROM "ranked_channels" WHERE "rank" = 1 ORDER BY "Group", "Fiscal Year" ASC;
